title: Google Drive trigger only fetches the oldest file
symptom: When using the Google Drive trigger, it only retrieves the oldest file instead of all new or modified files. This leads to incomplete updates in the vector database.
applies_when: Multiple files added/updated in a short time
not_this_if: Trigger is not activated before adding/updating files
Files are not added/updated in a short time span
root_cause: The Google Drive trigger activates only after the workflow is turned on. If files are added or updated before activation, they will not be detected. Additionally, the trigger may only process the most recent file during testing.
fix_steps: Activate the Google Drive trigger workflow
Add or update multiple files within a short time frame (e.g., 1 minute)
Check the execution logs to see if multiple items are retrieved
agent_instruction: Activate the workflow before adding or updating files to ensure all changes are detected.
